metadata.name: amodem
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

modules.name: amodem.common
documentation:
Common package functionality.
Commom utilities and procedures for amodem.

functions.name: amodem.common.iterate
documentation: Iterate over a signal, taking each time *size* elements.

functions.name: amodem.common.split
documentation:
Split an iterable of n-tuples into n iterables of scalars.
The k-th iterable will be equivalent to (i[k] for i in iter).

functions.name: amodem.common.icapture
documentation: Appends each yielded item to result.

functions.name: amodem.common.take
documentation: Take n elements from iterable, and return them as a numpy array.

classes.name: amodem.common.Dummy
documentation: Dummy placeholder object for testing and mocking.

functions.name: amodem.levinson.solver
documentation:
Solve Mx = y for x, where M[i,j] = t[|i-j|], in O(N^2) steps.
See http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Levinson_recursion for details.

modules.name: amodem.dsp
documentation: Digital Signal Processing capabilities for amodem.

functions.name: amodem.dsp.linear_regression
documentation: Find (a,b) such that y = a*x + b.

modules.name: amodem.alsa
documentation:
Code which adds Linux ALSA support for interfaces,
recording and playing.
